title: mushroooms
description: add many features related or not to mushrooms
body:
![base image](https://i.imgur.com/0ajE5oV.png)

## What is this mod about? This mod is a mod that add many features. Most of them are related to a mushroom overall but are not limited to it. This mod add blocks, items, biomes, mobs, structures... ## Compatibility : This mod should be compatible with most of the world gen mod like Regions unexplored, biomes o plenty, terralith, better end... ## Issues : Even though I test the new content before releasing it, there might have some bugs. If you find some, you are welcome to report it on the [github](https://github.com/RodoFire/mushroooms-mod/issues) You can also report on discord:
## developpement : This mod is still under active developement, way more content will be added. Since the first release of this mod, a lot of new features came and you could expect it to continue like that.
## Actual content : For the moment, the mod include : - lot of Blocks - lot of new items - 13 new biomes - 7 new mobs - Huge mushroom generation ## Future content : This is every content planned for the moment. Note that I can't say when everything will be ready in advance. It will took the time it will took. - new Blocks (of course) - new Items(of course too) - new Biomes(for the Overworld, nether and end) - Structures(none are added for the moment but it will come soon - new mobs - 3 new boss(1 for the overworld, 1 for the nether and 1 for the end) I welcome any suggestion, so if you have any idea on how to improve the mod, don't hesitate. You can open a discusion on the [github](https://github.com/RodoFire/mushroooms-mod/issues) If you are a developer, a modeler, a graphist/texture pack creator and if you want to participate to the mod, you are free to ## Actual content : Here is some screenshot of some of the content present in the mod

New Biomes :

![blue luminescent schroom cave](https://i.imgur.com/NFckBfK.png) ![new biome](https://i.imgur.com/QGpX3ER.png) ![new biomes](https://i.imgur.com/2lSDlGH.png) ## This mod requires some other mods to run: - [fabric-api](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) - [terrablender](https://modrinth.com/mod/terrablender) - [geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib) - [easier-world-creator](https://modrinth.com/mod/mushroooms) (starting from version 0.0.10)
